CREATE TABLE test_arrayJoin (id Int32, values Array(Int32));
SELECT id, arrayJoin(values) AS value FROM test_arrayJoin;
CREATE TABLE cities_browsers (city String, browser String);
SELECT city, browser FROM cities_browsers ARRAY JOIN browsers AS browser;
SELECT city, count() AS count FROM cities_browsers ARRAY JOIN browser GROUP BY city;
SELECT count() AS impressions, arrayJoin(['USA', 'Canada']) AS country FROM (SELECT 1) GROUP BY country;
SELECT city, browser FROM (SELECT ['Istanbul', 'Berlin'] AS cities, ['Firefox', 'Chrome'] AS browsers) ARRAY JOIN cities, browsers;

SELECT sum(1) AS impressions, (arrayJoin(arrayZip(cities, browsers)) AS t).1 AS city, t.2 AS browser FROM (SELECT ['Istanbul', 'Berlin'] AS cities, ['Firefox', 'Chrome'] AS browsers) GROUP BY city, browser;
CREATE TABLE orders (order_id Int32, product_ids Array(Int32));
SELECT order_id, arrayJoin(product_ids) AS product_id FROM orders;

SELECT sum(1) AS impressions, city, browser FROM (SELECT ['Istanbul', 'Berlin', 'Bobruisk'] AS cities, ['Firefox', 'Chrome', 'Opera'] AS browsers) ARRAY JOIN cities AS city, browsers AS browser GROUP BY city, browser;
CREATE TABLE user_activity (user_id Int32, activity_ids Array(Int32));
SELECT user_id, arrayJoin(activity_ids) AS activity FROM user_activity WHERE user_id = 1;
SELECT city, count() AS count FROM (SELECT ['Istanbul', 'Berlin'] AS cities) ARRAY JOIN cities GROUP BY city;
SELECT id, arrayJoin(arrayMap(x -> x + 1, values)) AS incremented_value FROM test_arrayJoin;
